_comment: UPE Marketing KPI targets — read by the daily council. Edit to retune goals.

north_star.followers_note: North-star organic followers (IL + EU decision-makers at companies that run events needing a production company / local supplier). Honest path is multi-year; the council optimizes the leading indicators below, not vanity follower count.

primary_kpi.leads_definition: Real NEW inbound leads from NEW potential clients for substantial events/conferences (not existing clients, not vendors).
primary_kpi.leads_source: UNWIRED — must connect Salesforce new-lead/opportunity count or website form source. Council flags until wired.

aeo_targets._comment: Targets for the weekly AEO/GEO loop. per_dimension_min = score below which a dimension is 'weak' and generates briefs.
